## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss content performance and next steps for vendor pages.](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [📉 Overall blog traffic dipped slightly; AI cluster saw 20% drop (positions 8→9)](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [📊 Per diem pages outperforming (avg position 8); expense category pages fluctuating](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [🆕 New vendor page templates approved; moving forward w/o graphs, using LLM-generated "best for" fields](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [🏗️ Ramp progressing on badges for pages; GrowthX to produce content before CMS integration](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [Blog pages: Overall sessions dropped (not drastically); biggest losses in cash flow, late fees, receipts](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Per diem pages: 2nd week of higher-than-average performance; avg position improved to 8](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Expense category: Slight drop; avg position fell 11→13; monitoring for serious trends](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Audit trails blog traffic up; assets/liabilities performing well](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Treasury pages: No major changes (only 3-4 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Vendor pages: "Versus" and review pages down \~1.5% in position (19 and 33 avg)](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [AI cluster: Biggest drop (20% traffic fall, position 8→9); potentially due to increased competition](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

### New Vendor Page Templates

  - [Victoria reviewed and approved new templates](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Key changes: Removed graphs, new approach to "best for" fields (using LLM-generated content)](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Alternative pages: Question about data field usage (Victoria to figure out)](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Versus pages: Will omit tables](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Review pages: Content part adjusted, top data points TBD](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Content Production Plans

  - [GrowthX to produce content without staging, add to CMS later with Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Vivek to provide production schedule](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Mika returning to office, will transition to take over some responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)

### Ramp's Progress

  - [Working on badges for pages](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Will collaborate with GrowthX on CMS integration later](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Victoria to change status in Airtable to greenlight vendor page production](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin producing vendor pages without staging](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Vivek to create and share content production schedule](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance, especially AI cluster and fluctuating categories](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Ramp to finalize badge development for pages](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Future collaboration on CMS integration for new content](https://fathom.video/share/efSNJyZJX7ELBj37zA883GSr4V9d9gfw?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
